statements.select:
with z as ( select * from CLAMFUNCM where 1=1
and PRGID=#PRGID#
and PRGID2=#PRGID2#
) select distinct * from (select a.* from CLAMFUNCM a inner join z on a.SYS_ID=z.SYS_ID and a.MODULES=' ' and a.SUBMODULES=' ' union select a.* from CLAMFUNCM a inner join z on a.SYS_ID=z.SYS_ID and a.MODULES=z.MODULES and a.SUBMODULES=' ' and a.PRGID=' ' union select a.* from CLAMFUNCM a inner join z on a.SYS_ID=z.SYS_ID and a.MODULES=z.MODULES and a.SUBMODULES=z.SUBMODULES and a.PRGID=' ' union select z.* from z ) order by SYS_ID,MODULES,SUBMODULES,PRGID,PRGID2

SELECT SYSID AS CODE, PRGNAME AS TEXT FROM( SELECT TO_CHAR(SYS_ID) AS SYSID, TO_CHAR(SYS_ID || ' ' || PRGNAME) AS PRGNAME,TO_CHAR(PRGORDER) FROM CLAMFUNCM WHERE MODULES = ' ' AND SUBMODULES=' ' AND PRGID= ' ' ORDER BY PRGORDER)

SELECT MODULES AS CODE, PRGNAME AS TEXT FROM( SELECT '' AS MODULES,'' AS PRGNAME,'000000' AS PRGORDER FROM CLAMFUNCM WHERE ROWNUM = 1 UNION SELECT TO_CHAR(MODULES) AS MODULES, TO_CHAR(MODULES || ' ' || PRGNAME) AS PRGNAME,TO_CHAR(PRGORDER) FROM CLAMFUNCM WHERE SUBMODULES=' ' AND PRGID= ' ' AND SYS_ID=#SYS_ID# AND MODULES <> ' ' ORDER BY PRGORDER)

SELECT SYS_ID, MODULES, SUBMODULES, PRGID, '' AS PRGNAME, PRGORDER, OPENAUTH, SHOWMENU, MODUSERID, MODUSERNAME, MODIP, MODTIME, PRGNAME AS SYSNAME, PRGNAME AS MODULESNAME, NETID FROM CLAMFUNCM WHERE 1 = 1 AND SYS_ID <> ' ' AND MODULES = ' ' AND SUBMODULES = ' ' AND PRGID = ' '
AND SYS_ID = #SYS_ID#
AND MODULES = #MODULES#
UNION SELECT SYS_ID, MODULES, SUBMODULES, PRGID, '' AS PRGNAME, PRGORDER, OPENAUTH, SHOWMENU, MODUSERID, MODUSERNAME, MODIP, MODTIME, (SELECT PRGNAME FROM CLAMFUNCM A WHERE A.SYS_ID = B.SYS_ID AND A.MODULES = ' ' AND A.SUBMODULES = ' ' AND A.PRGID = ' ') AS SYSNAME, PRGNAME AS MODULESNAME, NETID FROM CLAMFUNCM B WHERE 1 = 1 AND SYS_ID <> ' ' AND MODULES <> ' ' AND SUBMODULES = ' ' AND PRGID = ' '
AND SYS_ID = #SYS_ID#
AND MODULES = #MODULES#
UNION SELECT SYS_ID, MODULES, SUBMODULES, PRGID, TO_CHAR(PRGNAME), PRGORDER, OPENAUTH, SHOWMENU, MODUSERID, MODUSERNAME, MODIP, MODTIME, (SELECT PRGNAME FROM CLAMFUNCM A WHERE A.SYS_ID = B.SYS_ID AND A.MODULES = ' ' AND A.SUBMODULES = ' ' AND A.PRGID = ' ') AS SYSNAME, (SELECT PRGNAME FROM CLAMFUNCM C WHERE C.SYS_ID = B.SYS_ID AND C.MODULES = B.MODULES AND C.SUBMODULES = ' ' AND C.PRGID = ' ') AS MODULESNAME, NETID FROM CLAMFUNCM B WHERE 1 = 1 AND SYS_ID <> ' ' AND MODULES <> ' ' AND SUBMODULES <> ' ' AND PRGID = ' '
AND SYS_ID = #SYS_ID#
AND MODULES = #MODULES#
ORDER BY SYS_ID,MODULES,PRGORDER

SELECT UNITID || CLAMOPUNIT.OPCHN AS UNITIDN, SUBUNIT || SUBUNITN AS SUBUNITNN , USERNO, USERNAME FROM CLAMDBURM LEFT JOIN CLAMOPUNIT ON CLAMOPUNIT.OPCD=UNITID WHERE 1=1
AND UNITID IN ($WhereInOPCD$)
AND SUBUNIT IN ($WhereInSUBUNIT$)
ORDER BY UNITID,SUBUNIT,USERNO

SELECT A.SYS_ID,SYS.PRGNAME AS SYSNAME,A.MODULES,MODU.PRGNAME AS MODULESNAME,A.SUBMODULES,SUBM.PRGNAME AS SUBMODULESNAME,A.PRGID,A.PRGNAME FROM CLAMFUNCM A LEFT JOIN CLAMFUNCM SYS ON SYS.SYS_ID=A.SYS_ID AND SYS.MODULES=' ' AND SYS.SUBMODULES=' ' AND SYS.PRGID=' ' LEFT JOIN CLAMFUNCM MODU ON MODU.SYS_ID=A.SYS_ID AND MODU.MODULES=A.MODULES AND MODU.SUBMODULES=' ' AND MODU.PRGID=' ' LEFT JOIN CLAMFUNCM SUBM ON SUBM.SYS_ID=A.SYS_ID AND SUBM.MODULES=A.MODULES AND SUBM.SUBMODULES=A.SUBMODULES AND SUBM.PRGID=' ' WHERE A.PRGID<>' '
AND A.SYS_ID IN ($WhereInSYS_ID$)
AND A.SYS_ID||'-'||A.MODULES IN ($WhereInMODULES$)
AND A.SYS_ID||'-'||A.MODULES||'-'||A.SUBMODULES IN ($WhereInSUBMODULES$)
ORDER BY A.SYS_ID,A.MODULES,A.SUBMODULES,A.PRGID

select A.*, (SELECT max(modtime) FROM CLAMPWDH WHERE USERNO = A.USERNO) LAST_PW_CHG_DT, (SELECT MAX(LOGINDATETIME) FROM CLAMLOGIN WHERE USERNO = A.USERNO) LAST_LOGIN_DT, (Select OPCHN from CLAMOPUNIT Where OPCD=A.UNITID) UNIT_NAME from CLAMDBURM A where A.USERNO=#USERNO#
select distinct a.GRPID as "GROUP",b.GRPNAME as GROUP_NAME from CLAMUROLE a inner join CLAMGRP b on b.GRPID=a.GRPID where a.USERNO=#USERNO# order by a.GRPID
select '1' as NODE, a.SYS_ID, a.MODULES, a.SUBMODULES, a.PRGID2, a.PRGNAME, a.PRGORDER, NetID from CLAMFUNCM a where a.SHOWMENU = '1' and a.PRGID2 = ' ' order by PRGORDER

with CLAMFM as ( select distinct a.SYS_ID,a.MODULES,a.SUBMODULES,a.PRGID, b.PRGID2,b.PRGNAME,b.PRGORDER,a.NETID,b.QUERYSTRING2 from CLAMGMAPM a inner join CLAMFUNCM b on b.SYS_ID=a.SYS_ID and b.MODULES=a.MODULES and b.SUBMODULES=a.SUBMODULES and b.PRGID=a.PRGID and b.SHOWMENU='1' where a.GRPID in (select GRPID from CLAMUROLE where USERNO=#USERNO# ) and (a.NETID = '3' or a.NETID = #NETID# or rtrim(a.NETID) is null) ), CLAMFMTOP as ( select SYS_ID,MODULES,SUBMODULES,PRGID,PRGID2,PRGNAME,PRGORDER,NETID,QUERYSTRING2 from CLAMFUNCM where SHOWMENU = '1' and PRGID2 = ' ' ) select * from (select distinct '1' as NODE,a.* from CLAMFMTOP a where a.SYS_ID in (select SYS_ID from CLAMFM) union select '0' as NODE,a.* from CLAMFM a) order by SYS_ID,MODULES,SUBMODULES,PRGORDER,PRGID2

select distinct a.SYS_ID, a.MODULES, a.SUBMODULES, a.PRGID2, a.PRGNAME, a.PRGORDER, a.netid, a.QUERYSTRING2 from CLAMFUNCM a where a.SHOWMENU = '1' and a.PRGID2 is not null order by a.SYS_ID, a.MODULES, a.SUBMODULES, a.PRGID2

SELECT GRPID,GRPNAME,MODUSERID,MODUSERNAME,MODIP,MODTIME FROM CLAMGRP WHERE 1 = 1
AND GRPID = #GRPID#
AND GRPNAME LIKE '%' || #GRPNAME# || '%'
Order by GRPID
SELECT GRPID,GRPNAME,MODUSERID,MODUSERNAME,MODIP,MODTIME FROM CLAMGRP WHERE 1 = 1 AND GRPID = #GRPID#
SELECT GRPID FROM CLAMGRP WHERE GRPID = #GRPID#

SELECT #GRPID# GRPID,CLAMFUNCM.SYS_ID, CLAMFUNCM.MODULES, CLAMFUNCM.SUBMODULES, CLAMFUNCM.PRGID, CLAMFUNCM.PRGNAME, NVL(A.PRG_Q,0) as PRG_Q , NVL(A.PRG_I,0) as PRG_I , NVL(A.PRG_U,0) as PRG_U, NVL(A.PRG_D,0) as PRG_D, NVL(A.PRG_P,0) as PRG_P FROM CLAMGMAPM A RIGHT OUTER JOIN CLAMFUNCM ON A.SUBMODULES = CLAMFUNCM.SUBMODULES AND A.MODULES = CLAMFUNCM.MODULES AND A.PRGID = CLAMFUNCM.PRGID AND A.SYS_ID = CLAMFUNCM.SYS_ID
AND A.GRPID = #GRPID#
WHERE CLAMFUNCM.PRGID<>' '
AND CLAMFUNCM.SYS_ID = #SYS_ID#
AND CLAMFUNCM.MODULES = #MODULES#
AND (PRG_Q='1' OR PRG_I='1' OR PRG_U='1' OR PRG_D='1' OR PRG_P='1' )
Order by GRPID
SELECT SYS_ID AS CODE, SYS_NAME AS TEXT FROM SYSCODE ORDER BY SYS_ID

SELECT SYS_ID, PROF_ID, SYS_PROF_ID, PNAME, DATES, DATEE, MEMO, STATUS, (Case When STATUS = '1' Then '有效' Else '停用' End) STATUS_TEXT, (Select SYS_NAME From SYSCODE Where SYS_ID=NFCPROF.SYS_ID) SYS_NAME FROM NFCPROF WHERE 1 = 1
AND SYS_ID = #SYS_ID#
AND PNAME like '%' || #PNAME# || '%'
AND STATUS = #STATUS#
ORDER BY PROF_ID desc
SELECT to_char(PROF_ID) AS CODE, PNAME AS TEXT from nfcprof where status = '1' and DATEE >= to_char(sysdate, 'yyyymmdd') ORDER BY DATES

SELECT NAMELIST_ID, PROF_ID, NAME, IDNO, SEX, BIRTHDAY, ZIPCODE, ADDRESS, HTEL, OTEL, MOTEL, FAX, EMAIL, TITLE, TCOMMENT, NFC_ID, DECODE(SEX, 'F', '女', 'M', '男', '') SEX_TEXT FROM NAMELIST WHERE 1 = 1
AND PROF_ID = #PROF_ID#
ORDER BY NAMELIST_ID
SELECT to_char(PROF_ID) AS CODE, PNAME AS TEXT from nfcprof where status = '1' and DATES <= to_char(sysdate, 'yyyymmdd') and DATEE >= to_char(sysdate, 'yyyymmdd') ORDER BY DATES

SELECT to_char(CHECKIN_ITEM_ID) AS CODE, ITEM_NAME AS TEXT from CHECKIN_ITEM where PROF_ID = #PROF_ID# and ITEM_DATE = to_char(sysdate, 'yyyymmdd') and START_TIME <= to_char(sysdate, 'hh24mi') and END_TIME >= to_char(sysdate, 'hh24mi') ORDER BY SEQ

SELECT N.NAMELIST_ID, PROF_ID, NAME, IDNO, SEX, BIRTHDAY, HTEL, OTEL, MOTEL, TITLE, TCOMMENT, NFC_ID, DECODE(SEX, 'F', '女', 'M', '男', '') SEX_TEXT, #CHECKIN_ITEM_ID# as CHECKIN_ITEM_ID, C.CHECKIN_TYPE, C.DATETIME FROM NAMELIST N LEFT JOIN CHECKIN C ON N.NAMELIST_ID = C.NAMELIST_ID AND C.CHECKIN_ITEM_ID = #CHECKIN_ITEM_ID# AND C.CHECKIN_TYPE <> 'C' /*取消報到*/ WHERE N.PROF_ID = #PROF_ID#
ORDER BY N.NAMELIST_ID
SELECT SYS_PROF_ID AS CODE, PNAME AS TEXT from nfcprof where status = '1' and SYS_ID = #SYS_ID# and DATEE >= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE - 60, 'YYYYMMDD') ORDER BY DATES
SELECT SYS_ITEM_ID AS CODE, ITEM_NAME AS TEXT from CHECKIN_ITEM where PROF_ID IN (Select PROF_ID From NFCPROF Where SYS_PROF_ID = #SYS_PROF_ID#) and SYS_ITEM_ID is not null ORDER BY SEQ
